headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Cognizant Tech Solns, Lowers Price Target to $51
summary: Citigroup  analyst Bryan Keane   maintains Cognizant Tech Solns (NASDAQ:CTSH) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $58 to $51.

headline: Cognizant Tech Solutions-A (NASDAQ:CTSH): A High-Rated Dividend Stock with Strong Profitability and Financial Health
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) offers a reliable 2.54% dividend yield with strong sustainability. Rated 8 for profitability and 9 for financial health, it combines a growing income stream with a low P/E of 8.45 and minimal debt.

headline: Here’s Why Hedge Funds Are Still Bullish On Accenture (ACN) Despite Hitting 52-Week Low
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is one of the Best 52-Week Low Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds.
